base.apConnectDesc: Follow the steps below to connect your app to the device via Wi-Fi.
base.apStep1Desc: Go to Wi-Fi Settings on your phone.
base.apStep3Desc: After connecting, return to the app and tap the button below.
base.bleConnectionError: Cannot connect to device via BLE. Please try again.
base.bluetoothOff: Bluetooth is turned off. Please enable Bluetooth to search for devices.
base.bluetoothPermissionRequired: Bluetooth permission required. Please go to Settings to allow the app to access Bluetooth.
base.configureDeviceDesc: Enter a convenient name and the Wi-Fi credentials for your new device.
base.configuringDeviceDesc: Registering and sending configuration to the device. Please wait.
base.confirmLedDesc: Check the LED on your device and select the matching status.
base.ledFastBlinkDesc: Device is in BLE (Bluetooth) mode. Fast and stable connection.
base.ledNotBlinking: LED not blinking? How to reset the device
base.ledSlowBlinkDesc: Device is in AP (Wi-Fi) mode. Connect via device's Wi-Fi network.
base.noDeviceSelected: No device selected. Please go back and select a device from the list.
base.noSessionError: No session established. Please reconnect the device.
base.registerDeviceFailed: Cannot register device. Please try again.
base.scanAgainDesc: If you don't see your device, please scan again.
base.searchDeviceDesc: Allow us to check for nearby devices using Bluetooth or Wi-Fi.
base.searchingDesc: Please make sure all your devices are connected to Wi-Fi or Bluetooth.
base.wifiConnectionError: Cannot connect to device via Wi-Fi. Make sure you are connected to the device's Wi-Fi network.

introduction.description: Sensa Smart is a smart home management application by vincent.le. Connect, control, and monitor your IoT devices from anywhere. Designed for simplicity, security, and seamless home automation.
introduction.feature1: Control lights, switches, and devices remotely

settings.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to log out?

messageCenter.emptyDescription: You don't have any messages yet. Messages from the system will appear here.

notification.emptyDescription: You're all caught up! We'll notify you when something important happens.

privacy.bluetoothDesc: Used to discover and connect to Smart Home devices via BLE.
privacy.cameraDesc: Used to scan QR codes for quick device pairing.
privacy.headerDesc: Sensa Smart requests access to certain device features to provide core smart home functionality. You can manage these permissions at any time in your device settings.
privacy.microphoneDesc: Used for voice control of your smart home devices.
privacy.photosDesc: Used for profile pictures and home/room customization.
privacy.siriDesc: Used to control devices with voice commands via Siri.
privacy.speechRecognitionDesc: Used to process voice commands for device control.

privacyPolicy.contactContent:
If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

Email: vulewenlian94@gmail.com
privacyPolicy.intro: vincent.le ("I", "me", "my") operates the Sensa Smart mobile application. This Privacy Policy explains how I collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use my app.
privacyPolicy.section1Content:
We collect the following types of information:

• Account information (email, name, phone number)
• Device data (device status, configuration, usage patterns)
• Usage data (app interactions, feature usage, crash reports)
• Sensor data (temperature, energy consumption from connected devices)
privacyPolicy.section2Content:
Your information is used to:

• Provide and maintain smart home control functionality
• Improve app performance and user experience
• Send important notifications about your devices
• Provide customer support
• Ensure security and prevent unauthorized access
privacyPolicy.section3Content:
We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data:

• End-to-end encryption for device communication
• Secure HTTPS connections for all API calls
• Encrypted data storage on our servers
• Regular security audits and updates
privacyPolicy.section4Content:
We do not sell your personal information. We may share data with:

• Cloud service providers (for data storage and processing)
• Analytics services (anonymized usage data only)
• Law enforcement (when required by law)
privacyPolicy.section5Content: Sensa Smart is not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe a child has provided us with personal data, please contact us.
privacyPolicy.section6Content:
You have the right to:

• Access your personal data
• Request correction of inaccurate data
• Request deletion of your account and data
• Export your data in a portable format
• Withdraw consent for data processing

To exercise these rights, contact us at vulewenlian94@gmail.com.
